since_last: 69% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.23%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.20% · BTC +2.76% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -0.76%. 69% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.23%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.23%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.99%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.99%, META +10.72%, APP +10.16%, PLTR +9.01%, SNAP +8.14%. Laggards: TER -9.23%, KLAC -9.19%, MU -8.07%, AMAT -7.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.31% at $160.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
